summary: Accumula Town is a small town located in southeastern Unova. The town has two exits: to the south is Route 1, leading to Nuvema Town; to the west is Route 2, leading northwards to Striaton City.
Alfornada is a town in the Paldea region, located in South Province (Area Six). Because of the Gym's specialized type, the people of this town tend to walk around accompanied by Psychic-type Pokémon.
Ambrette Town is a town located in the southwest portion of the Kalos region. It is situated on the edge of a seaside cliff with a narrow coastline.
Anistar City is a city located in the Kalos region.

Anville Town is situated in the northwestern part of the Unova region. It is accessed by riding the Battle Subway's Anville line (shown brown on the subway map) from Gear Station in Nimbasa City; no battles are required to be able to go to this town.
Aquacorde Town is a town located in the southeastern part of the Kalos region. It is the place where the player gets their first partner Pokémon.
Artazon is a town in the Paldea region, located on the border of South Province (Area Three) and East Province (Area One). It is known for its flowers and art.

Aspertia City is a small city situated in southwestern Unova and serves as the hometown of the Unova player character in Pokémon Black 2 and White 2. The settlement exists on Unova's western strip of land, and is surrounded by forest.

Azalea Town is a small, isolated town located on the southern peninsula of the Johto region. The town is best known for being the residence of Kurt, a custom Poké Ball creator who makes Poké Balls out of Apricorns.
Ballonlea is a small, secluded town situated in a dense forest in the northwestern Galar region. The town's sole access route via land is through Glimwood Tangle, which is located to the south.

Black City is a city located in the eastern part of the Unova region. Black City is exclusive to Pokémon Black and Pokémon Black 2, and features Trainers and tasks that do not appear or occur in Pokémon White and White 2.
Blackthorn City is a city located in northeast Johto. It is home to the Blackthorn Gym, led by the Gym Leader Clair, who specializes in Dragon-type Pokémon.
Cabo Poco is a small town on a cape in the south of the Paldea region. It is the hometown of the player and their rival, Nemona, in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
Camphrier Town is a town located in the central Kalos region. The northern part of town houses Shabboneau Castle, a large castle once home to a generous king, surrounded by a moat.
Canalave City is a city in the Sinnoh region. Canalave City is a port city that is bisected by a canal which is crossed by a small drawbridge.
Cascarrafa is a city in the Paldea region, located on the edge of the Asado Desert and West Province (Area One). It is known as the City of Water.
Castelia City is a large seaside city located in south central Unova. Unlike other cities, Castelia is a huge, sprawling metropolis, sporting many towering skyscrapers and other tall buildings.
If you were looking for the chapter in Pokémon Zensho, see PZ05. Celadon City is located in central Kanto.
Celestic Town is a town in the Sinnoh region. It is a tiny town that preserves the history of Sinnoh and the old ways of life.
If you were looking for the chapter in Pokémon Zensho, see PZ03. Cerulean City is a seaside city located in northern Kanto.
Fortree City is a city, roughly between Mauville and Lilycove, in the Hoenn region. To its west are Route 119 and the Weather Institute, and to its east Route 120 and the Safari Zone.
Four Island is a small town located on the south-west side of Four Island. It is the most isolated of the seven cities of the Sevii Islands, as there are no routes connecting to it.
Freezington Freeze Village) is a village in the Crown Tundra in the Galar region. It connects to Slippery Slope to the north and Frostpoint Field to the south.
The Frontier Access is a location in Johto. It debuted in Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver.
If you were looking for the chapter in Pokémon Zensho, see PZ06. Fuchsia City is a city located in southwest Kanto.
Geosenge Town is a rural town located in the western part of the Kalos region. It is well known for its unusual rock structures which are rumored to have mysterious powers.
Goldenrod City is a sprawling metropolis located in western Johto. It is the largest city in the region, and one of the largest cities in the Pokémon world.
Hammerlocke is a city situated in the center of the Galar region.
Hau'oli City is a coastal city situated on Melemele Island of the Alola region. It is the main location of the Pokémon Sun and Pokémon Moon Special Demo Version.
Heahea City is a coastal city situated on Akala Island of the Alola region. The city was founded long ago by Trainers from the Kanto and Johto regions.
Hearthome City is a city in the Sinnoh region. Hearthome City is the fifth-largest city in the Pokémon world.
Hulbury is a small town located in central Galar. It is home to the Galar region's Water-type Gym, Hulbury Stadium.
Humilau City is a city in northeastern Unova. It is the location of the Humilau Gym, with the Gym Leader Marlon.
Icirrus City is a city located in northwestern Unova. Icirrus City is connected to Twist Mountain to the west, and Route 8 to the east.
Iki Town is a town on Melemele Island of the Alola region. It is where Kahuna Hala lives, and in Pokémon Sun and Moon, is the place where the player gets their first partner Pokémon.
Jubilife City is a city in the Sinnoh region. Jubilife is the most modernized city in the region, and according to the animated series, the largest city in Sinnoh.

Jubilife Village is a village in the Hisui region that was constructed by the Galaxy Expedition Team. It lies to the west of the Obsidian Fieldlands and the Cobalt Coastlands on a section of Hisui's western shore.

Kiloude City is a city located in the southern part of the Kalos region and is only accessible after the TMV Pass is obtained from Professor Sycamore in Lumiose Station after entering the Hall of Fame. After participating in a battle in the Battle Maison, Calem/Serena will battle the player daily in the north of the city.
Konikoni City is a coastal city situated on Akala Island of the Alola region. An isolated area of Konikoni City can be accessed from Diglett's Tunnel using Machamp Shove.
Lacunosa Town is a town in the northeastern area of the Unova region. To the west of Lacunosa Town is Route 12 and to the east is Route 13.

New Bark Town is located in southeastern Johto and is the hometown of the Johto player character. It is home to the lab of Professor Elm, who possesses the first partner Pokémon for Johto: Chikorita, Cyndaquil, and Totodile.

Nimbasa City is a city located in central Unova. There are three routes connecting to it: to the south of the city is Route 4 and the vast Desert Resort, to the west is Route 5, and to the east is Route 16.
Nuvema Town is a small town located in southeastern Unova. It is the hometown of the player in Pokémon Black and White.
Oldale Town is located in southwestern Hoenn. As Kyushu coincides with Hoenn, Oldale approximates with Saga City, Saga Prefecture.
Olivine redirects here. For the lake in Hey You, Pikachu!, see Olivine Lake.
One Island is a small town located on One Island in the Sevii Islands. The only major defining point of the town is the Pokémon Network Center, run by Celio, a friend of Bill.

Opelucid City is a city located in northern Unova. The look of the city differs between versions; in Black and Black 2, the city has a futuristic, technological appearance, while in White and White 2, it has a traditional, more natural appearance.
Oreburgh City is a city located in central Sinnoh. Oreburgh is first accessible via the Oreburgh Gate, which is to the west of the city.
Pacifidlog Town is a town located in the seas south of the mainland of the Hoenn region. Pacifidlog Town is a small town built on wooden rafts and logs that float on top of a Corsola colony.
Pallet Town is a small town located in southwestern Kanto. It is the hometown of the player and their rival in the Kanto-based games.
Paniola Town is a town on Akala Island in the Alola region. Route 4 leads to Paniola Town from the south, and the town connects to Paniola Ranch in the north.
Pastoria City is a city in the Sinnoh region. It is also the home of the Move Reminder, the Scarf Guy and the Sinnoh region's Safari Zone.
Pearl Settlement is a place in the Hisui region founded by the Pearl Clan, located in the northeastern part of the Alabaster Icelands. It is the home to Irida and the rest of the Pearl Clan.
Petalburg City is located in southwestern Hoenn. Despite Petalburg being the first city with a Gym, the Gym is not accessible until after obtaining four Badges.
If you were looking for the chapter in Pokémon Zensho, see PZ02. Pewter City is a city located in northwestern Kanto.
Po Town is a town situated on Ula'ula Island of the Alola region. It is occupied by Team Skull and houses their base of operations, the Shady House.
Porto Marinada is a town in the Paldea region, located in West Province (Area Two).
Postwick is a small town located at the southern end of the Galar region. It is the hometown of the Galarian player character and their rival, Hop.
This article is about the location in the Battle Zone. For the Pokéwalker Route, see Resort (Pokéwalker).
Rustboro City is a metropolis located in western Hoenn. It is the fourth-largest city in Hoenn, after Mauville City, Lilycove City and Slateport City.
Agate Village is a small, lush, forest village located in north-central Orre. A large river runs past the town, accounting for its abundance of flora in an area that is primarily desert.
Gateon Port is a seaside city in northwestern Orre. It only appears in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, and is one of the first areas accessible in the game.
Phenac City is a small city built around a desert oasis in southeast Orre. The entire city is surrounded by a wall that keeps out the harsh desert winds.

The Aqua Resort is a location in Pokémon Ranger: Guardian Signs. It is a peaceful resort located in southeast Sophian Island, and is the third of three civilized areas that the player visits during their adventure.
Axle Town is the fifth and last accessible town in Pokémon Rumble Blast, located within the World Axle. It holds a Move Vendor for Draco Meteor and a Yellow Move-a-Majig.

Baram Town is a settlement on the Air Continent in Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon. The player and their partner first visit the town accidentally while traveling with Archen of the Expedition Society on Lapras.
Boyleland is a village in Pokémon Ranger: Shadows of Almia. Boyleland is connected to Pueltown and Haruba Village by boat.

Capim Town is a settlement on the Grass Continent in Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon. The player and their partner can visit the town on the Lapras Travel Liner as long as the corresponding Lapras Liner Pass has been bought from the Kecleon Shop.
Centra City is the largest city on the island of Pasio in Pokémon Masters EX.
Chicole Village is an area in Pokémon Ranger: Shadows of Almia. It is located south of Vientown.
Cocona Village is a location in Pokémon Ranger: Guardian Signs. It is located in Renbow Island and near Dolce Island.

Easterly Town is the second town accessible in Pokémon Rumble Blast, located in Sun-Dappled Bank. It is available after beating the Battle Royale in 1-4, Challenger's Ground, and contains a move vendor with SolarBeam, a move-a-majig, and a Munna who can be given Passwords.
Fall City is a large city in Fiore. It is the location of the second numbered mission in Pokémon Ranger.
Haruba Village is an area in Pokémon Ranger: Shadows of Almia. When the player first arrives by boat, a vicious sandstorm is blowing due to a Gigaremo hypnotizing the Hippopotas.
Lively Town is a town in Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon located on Water Continent. The player and their partner first travel there after they leave Serene Village.

Mintale Town is the setting of Pokémon Channel. Although its location in relation to the rest of the Pokémon world is never stated, Mintale Town is popularly believed to be located in or near Kanto due to the appearance of Viridian Forest.

Noe Town is a settlement on the Mist Continent in Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon. The player and their partner can visit the town on the Lapras Travel Liner as long as the corresponding Lapras Liner Pass has been bought from the Kecleon Shop.
Northerly Town is the fourth accessible town in Pokémon Rumble Blast, located within Frozen Tundra. It holds a move vender for Surf and a Red Move-a-Majig.
is the main settlement in Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Keep Going! Stormy Adventure Squad!, similarly to Treasure Town or Pokémon Square.
is the main settlement in Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Keep Going! Light Adventure Squad!, similarly to Treasure Town or Pokémon Square.
Post Town is the central village in Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Gates to Infinity. It is populated solely by Pokémon, like the rest of the world presented in the game.
Pueltown is an area in Pokémon Ranger: Shadows of Almia. It is called the heart of Almia.

Pokémon Puzzle League Village or Puzzle Village is the setting of Pokémon Puzzle League. When Ash receives a phone call from Professor Oak, telling him that he has been selected as a challenger of the Puzzle League Tournament, he and Pikachu race to the village.
Ringtown is a small town in Fiore. It is the home of the Ringtown Ranger Base run by Spenser, which is where the player is stationed for duty.

Ryme City is the setting of the game Detective Pikachu, the game's sequel Detective Pikachu Returns, and the movie based on the game, POKÉMON Detective Pikachu. Its slogan is A Place of Harmony Between Humans and Pokémon.

Sahra Town is a settlement on the Sand Continent in Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon. The player and their partner can visit the town on the Lapras Travel Liner as long as the corresponding Lapras Liner Pass has been bought from the Kecleon Shop.
Serene Village is the starting village in Pokémon Super Mystery Dungeon. At the beginning of the game, the player is taken here by Nuzleaf and lives in his house.

The Shaymin Village is a village that is only available in Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Explorers of Sky. There are only seven residents (six once the venture up Sky Peak is completed and a Shaymin is recruited) of Shaymin Village, all of which are Shaymin.
Shiver Camp is an area in Pokémon Ranger: Shadows of Almia. The Shiver Camp is a base used by a Pokémon research team in the east of Hia Valley.
Shivre City is a 4-on-4 Quick Battle stage in Pokémon UNITE.
Summerland is a small tropical town in Fiore. It is the home of the Summerland Ranger Base run by Cameron.
Think Town is the setting of Pokémon Friends. It is known for the production of Pokémon plush.
Tilt Village is a location in Pokémon Ranger: Guardian Signs. It is located east of Booker Bridge and west of both Mitonga Road and Dangerous Cliff on Mitonga Island.
Toy Town is the first accessible town in Pokémon Rumble Blast, located within Trailhead Field. It holds a move vendor for Giga Impact and a Move-a-majig, as well as the normal town facilities.

Treasure Town is the central village in Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Explorers of Time and Explorers of Darkness and Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Explorers of Sky. It is populated solely by Pokémon, like the rest of the world presented in the game and animated special.
Vientown is a town in the game Pokémon Ranger: Shadows of Almia. It is located in the center of Almia, and is the nearest town to the Ranger School.
Westerly Town is the third accessible town in Pokémon Rumble Blast, located within Rugged Flats. It holds a move vendor for Fire Blast and a Red and Gold Move-a-Majig.
Wintown is a small town in Fiore. It is the home of the Wintown Ranger Base run by Elita.
